pi_items.verified_value: All 9 track names are standard physiological monitoring parameters
pi_items.source: Verified against standard anesthesia monitoring nomenclature: ECG (electrocardiogram), PLETH (pulse oximetry plethysmograph), HR (heart rate), ST segment analysis, SPO2 (oxygen saturation), VENT_RR (ventilator respiratory rate), VENT_MV (minute ventilation). All consistent with VitalDB documented parameters.

pi_items.metadata_value: VitalDB is a real public dataset from Seoul National University Hospital
pi_items.source: Nature Scientific Data article (s41597-022-01411-5), PMC9178032, PhysioNet repository, official VitalDB website (vitaldb.net). Dataset contains 6,388 real surgical cases recorded between August 2016 and June 2017.

pi_items.verified_value: Approved by Institutional Review Board of Seoul National University Hospital (H-1408-101-605)
pi_items.source: VitalDB Nature Scientific Data article and official documentation

privileged_info_summary: Case 0002 is a real noncardiac surgical case from the VitalDB dataset, recorded at Seoul National University Hospital. The case has a total recording duration of approximately 4 hours 22 minutes 20 seconds. Surgery started at timestamp 00:28:41 and finished at 04:03:41, making the surgical duration approximately 3 hours 35 minutes (215 minutes). The recording includes 9 physiological parameters: ECG leads (ECG_II, ECG_V5), pulse oximetry waveform (PLETH), heart rate (HR), ST segment analysis (ST_V5), oxygen saturation (PLETH_SPO2), pulse-derived heart rate (PLETH_HR), ventilator respiratory rate (VENT_RR), and minute ventilation (VENT_MV). The data is from a legitimate, de-identified, publicly available dataset of real surgical recordings.
